summary: Pure time_only 60s exit paired with a taker_buy_ratio_5m filter — no leakage, no live conflict, acceptable as a paper-shadow exit experiment despite the family's poor historical track record.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: novel_dim uses taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.65, which is a backward-looking 5m aggregate observable at T0. No forward_*, confirm_after_*, or post_event_* fields. The 60s time exit is a future holding window (deliberate, not leakage). Field is on the SUPPORTED_FIELDS allowlist per R1 lesson.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Exit-only archetype with NA channel/side; cannot itself open a position conflicting with the live BWE_OI_Price pump-long strategy. Only conflict surface is if it gets paired in backtest with a short entry on a symbol the live system is long — a pairing-layer concern, not an exit-rule concern.
risk_assessments.remediation: None required for integrity. Advisory: when paired in backtest, restrict to entries whose side matches live posture (long) on overlapping symbols to avoid offsetting the live book; flag in scorecard that time_only family has 0/2745 positives historically so the 60s+taker-ratio combo must clear a higher bar (e.g. require mean and p25_capped_tail both > 0, not just legacy p25) before promotion.
